list.emptyHint: Run {{cmd}} to create your first project.

newProject.title: New project
newProject.name: Project name
newProject.nameHint: Letters, digits, _ and - only. e.g. acme-web
newProject.nameInvalid: Name may only contain a-z A-Z 0-9 _ -
newProject.dirHint: Absolute path on this machine (code or docs are both fine). Independent of the git toggle.
newProject.dirAutoCreate: Auto-create the directory if missing (recommended — otherwise .claude/ and wiki/ install are skipped)
newProject.ackTimeoutHint: How long after launch with no ACK before the worker is treated as failed
newProject.enableGitHint: When off, the Worker just runs the task without version control; good for docs/data projects.
newProject.remotePathHint: e.g. user/repo. Empty skips the remote API (local commit/push only).
newProject.enableWikiHintMid: dir and injects 5-layer retrieval context plus wiki-update hints into Worker prompts. You can also enable later with
newProject.matrixRoomHint: empty = use global config; blank = no notifications

config.etagConflictBody: The conf file was modified while you were editing. Click "Reload" before editing again.

pipeline.empty: No pipeline files yet. Click "New pipeline" to start.
pipeline.switchBody: Current project.yaml will be overwritten with the contents of {{name}}. Continue?
pipeline.deleteBody: This pipeline file will be permanently deleted.

danger.deleteHint: This will clean up {{path}} (including all cards, runtime, logs).
danger.repoUntouched: The repo itself is untouched; only this directory is cleaned.
danger.confirmType: Type the project name {{name}} to confirm:

pipelineEditor.activeWarn: ⚠ This is the active pipeline; takes effect on the next tick after save
pipelineEditor.modeProject: project = event-driven pipeline (default) · steps = sequential script
pipelineEditor.noStages: No stages yet. Click "Add stage" to start.
pipelineEditor.stageOnFailureActionHint: action on failure, e.g. label NEEDS-FIX
pipelineEditor.stopOnFailureNote: (stops the pipeline on failure; remove to continue with the next card)
pipelineEditor.filenameInvalid: Invalid pipeline filename, or it must not be project.yaml

newPipelineDialog.title: New pipeline
newPipelineDialog.filenameHint: Allowed: a-z A-Z 0-9 _ -. A duplicate name returns 409.
newPipelineDialog.tutorialDesc: Copy from sample.yaml.example (commented, explains every field)
newPipelineDialog.copyDesc: Copy from project.yaml (start from the current config)
